Railroad Worker Obi:
Here should be a railroad that leads to the stars on the sky. Passengers would take an air train which brings them to the farthest station called Gods' Palace at the Sea of Stars.
By the way, the building behind me was a storage constructed to keep construction material.
the air railroad project was developed by Giants. All building work was put under dwarven care. Even at that time Dwarves had a reputation of talented builders.
But soon after the work started, Giants met a total defeat in the war against the Gods.
